calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Gail Dekreon, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Paul K. Lee, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Petrini Place Homeowners Association.
Gabriel Ridick, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Soo Gu Lee.
Default was entered against defendant on March 12, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 12, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Petrini Place Homeowners Association, and against the Defaulted Defendant Soon Gu Lee as follows:

Damages/Principal - $8,183.81.
Attorney's Fees - $1,700.00.
Costs -$793.50, for a total judgment in the amount of 10,677.31.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-28-2010 Continued To Jul-23-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
